metadata.name: Roadside Assistance for Out of Fuel

description: A customer has run out of fuel and is stranded on the side of the road.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's plan includes fuel delivery service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the plan covers delivery of up to 2 gallons of fuel.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the customer's location and confirm the fuel type needed (e.g., regular unleaded, diesel).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the location and confirms the vehicle needs regular unleaded.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a service provider to deliver fuel and provide an ETA.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches a provider and gives a 40-minute ETA.
